name: Checkr
description: Monitor Checkr background check candidates for HR verification compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Checkr at https://dashboard.checkr.com
2. Go to Developer Settings -> API Keys
3. Copy your API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Checkr Dashboard -> Developer Settings -> API Keys
